name: Giant's Holiday Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Green Giant American Mixture (frozen broccoli, carrots, and cauliflower)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart microwave-safe casserole dish, combine the vegetables, cream of broccoli soup, milk, soy sauce, and half the onions.
2. Microwave on HIGH for 10 to 12 minutes (or bake in an oven preheated to 375°F for 30 to 35 minutes), stirring occasionally, until the vegetables are hot.
3. Top with the remaining French Fried Onions.
4. Serve 5 servings.
